title: trisetum melicoides var. majus
intro: Trisetum melicoides var. majus, also known as tall melic grass or big melic grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. This perennial grass is native to the mountainous regions of the United States and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Trisetum melicoides var. majus include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
